Name: Colonel Myrdden
Description: Colonel Myrdden was an unscrupulous mercenary who sold his magical abilities to the highest bidder, specializing in rapid theft operations. During one such job, he led a small team into Doctor Strange ’s Sanctum Sanctorum in the sorcerer’s absence, acting on behalf of an unidentified client with the objective of obtaining the Book of Morphesti. After securing the artifact, Myrdden made the critical mistake of activating it. The act left him physically immobilized and triggered a powerful spell that warped and mutated those caught within its influence. The resulting disturbance drew the attention of Spider-Man and Mr. Rasputin, who accompanied S. H. I. E. L. D.
